## What to do
Update llms.txt to include an entry for the new enforcement hook.

## Edit required
Add entry:
```
.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh — pre-commit hook that blocks commits introducing plugins/dso self-references into files under plugins/dso/; suppressed per-line with # plugin-self-ref-ok: <reason>
```

Place it near other .claude/hooks/ entries in the file.

## Files to modify
- llms.txt
